intro: A playground of interactive things I build.

hero.tagline: Frontend engineer working at the seams of frameworks.

techStack.prompt: pick a tech to see how it shows up in my work →

notes.react: Daily driver — currently at DBS (microfrontend webview), previously eDOT, Doubler Studio.
notes.next: Landing + onboarding webview at Ajaib, internal dashboards at eDOT.
notes.svelte: Powers the federated remote you've been interacting with on this page.
notes.angular: Feature modules at Bank Danamon — DBankPro 2.0, Single-SPA → NX migration.
notes.vue: Exploring — planned as a second federated remote on this playground.
notes.javascript: Vanilla JS + jQuery on BCA projects at Doubler Studio — where it started.

liveRemote.description: This whole page is <react>React</react>. The component you'll fetch below is a separate <svelte>Svelte</svelte> app — a different framework, its own deployment — pulled over the network and mounted right here. That's Module Federation.

status.idle: idle · press Run to fetch the remote

offline.simulatedDescription: This is the fallback a visitor sees when a remote is unavailable. The host stays fully interactive — only this block degrades.
offline.devHint: The Svelte remote (naufal-lab) isn't running. In dev, start it with <code1>npm run dev:mf</code1> inside <code2>naufal-lab/</code2>.

themeDrawer.title: // theme
themeDrawer.description: Restyle the site live. One set of CSS variables on the host cascades across the Module Federation boundary — so a live Svelte remote re-skins with it, no remount.
